title: JSON wrong net contents, label correct (distance-downsample, level 10, tilt-left)
image_prompt: Photorealistic clear glass bottle with a minimalist ice-themed label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Glacier Point', 'Vodka', '40% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Distilled and bottled by Glacier Distillers, Anchorage, AK'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Visual note: label was photographed from too far away with severe downsampling. Camera orientation is tilt-left (-15 degrees).
